name: EELIGATOR
description: A massive predator combining the worst traits of electric eel and alligator - twelve feet of scaled muscle with webbed claws and a wickedly barbed tail. Its hide crackles with bio-electric energy, and its jaws lock with bone-crushing force.
motives: Ambush prey from submerged positions, drag victims underwater to drown, defend the black water lake from intruders

features.name: Relentless (2)
features.description: This adversary can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Move Through Mire
features.description: While within its hunting grounds (the black water), any effect that might slow or limit the Eeligator's movement is ignored. With its webbed feet and low center of gravity, the Eeligator is perfectly suited to navigate water and unstable terrain. The creature glides effortlessly through the viscous black water, where others would struggle with every step.

features.name: Healing Skin
features.description: At the start of each turn, the Eeligator may mark a Stress to heal 1 HP. The beast's regenerative flesh knits wounds shut almost as quickly as they're made.

features.name: Death Grip
features.description: When you hit with a Snapping Jaws attack, you can mark a Stress to lock the target in its jaws. The target is Restrained until an action is used to escape or the Eeligator takes Major damage. Each turn, the Eeligator pulls the target closer to the water, causing the target to mark a Stress. The powerful jaws clamp down like a vice, dragging the struggling victim inexorably toward the dark water.

features.name: Pull Under
features.description: If the Eeligator starts its turn within Very Close range of the black water with a target under the effects of Death Grip, spend 1 Fear to drag them under, making them Restrained and Drowning. While Drowning, at the end of each turn the target is spotlighted, they mark a Stress. With a violent thrash, the predator vanishes beneath the surface, taking its prey with it into the suffocating depths.

features.name: Volt Strike
features.description: Attack a target with the Eeligator's electrically charged tail. On a success, deal 2d10 magical damage and the target becomes Vulnerable. The barbed tail whips forward with a crack of electricity, stunning its victim and leaving them exposed.

features.name: Ambushing Grab
features.description: If a creature is within Very Close range while the Eeligator is submerged in water, spend 3 Fear to take the Death Grip action without marking Stress. If the attack hits, you may immediately use the Pull Under action, spending Fear to do so as normal. The water explodes as the hidden predator erupts from below, jaws already clamping down on its unsuspecting prey.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Eeligator makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear. Each successful strike empowers the beast, making it more dangerous with every moment.

lore: This apex predator of the flooded depths has evolved into a perfect ambush hunter, combining the electrical stunning power of an eel with the crushing bite force and death roll of an alligator. Its ability to regenerate and its terrifying grab-and-drown tactics make it one of the most feared creatures in the underground waterways.
